{{Quote|She's a cranky old thing, but when she sees what the GAM can do, I'm sure she'll come around|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|<ref name="Remnant">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref>}}
'''Essenton''' was a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of an [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Fleet/Legends|Starfleet]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
Described as being somewhat "cranky" and perhaps in advance age, her competence appeared to be enough to overcome the long-rooted Imperial female prejudice as by at least [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] she was known to command the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Defiant (Imperial-class)|''Defiant'']]. During the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]], she was instructed by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] to assist a certain [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arber]] subsequent to her Star Destroyer being fitted with a [[gravitic amplitude modulator]] (GAM), a device capable of jamming [[yammosk]] war-coordinating messages among [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces. When ordered to engage, Essenton commanded the ''Defiant'' into the heart of the enemy formation, attacking the yammosk-bearing warship-analog and rendering debris. Almost immediately a second yammosk was located among the enemy fleet and Essenton led the ''Defiant'' in engaging it as well, though it would prove unnecessary as the Yuuzhan Vong forces withdrew soon after. Following the battle, Essenton was ordered to take ''Defiant'' to [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] in order to assist in the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense]] of that planet.<ref name="Remnant" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1stm}}
